summary: Where to begin! summary: Lately, I’ve been getting involved with some sketchy stuff. You know what I’m talking about–data migrations. title: TypeScript magic
summary: At Artsy, we love TypeScript. We use it in most of our node/web/mobile repos. title: Are you using the right Mongo geospatial query?
summary: We recently got a report from one of our galleries in the Los Angeles area that they weren’t showing up on our Los Angeles exhibition listings. I fielded the report and right away confirmed: when we asked our core API for /shows?near=<los angeles coordinates>, sure enough this gallery partner didn’t make the cut. title: Parallelizing Jest and Cypress.io Tests on CircleCI
summary: At Artsy, exploring ways to improve the developer experience is part of our makeup. title: Hacking Around Safari's 7-day Cookie Limit
summary: Amongst the many, many things that organizations have to contend with around cookie consent laws is Apple’s very own browser, Safari. Did you know that Safari will only retain a client-side cookie for 7 days? This is in support of Apple’s Intelligent Tracking Prevention (ITP) feature, designed to protect a user’s privacy. These privacy efforts are great but, in hand…
